---
title: "Quantile Binning for Microbiome ML"
subtitle: "EuroBioC2026 — Results Report"
author:
  - name: "Rasmus Hindström"
    affiliation: "Department of Computing, University of Turku"
    email: "rasmus.hindstrom@utu.fi"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    theme: flatly
    embed-resources: true   # single self-contained HTML
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
    fig-dpi: 150
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false              # targets handles caching — never cache in Quarto
params:
  store: "../_targets"      # path to targets store, relative to this .qmd
---

```{r}
library(targets)

tar_load(tse_list)
```
